allow: PowerShell($body = '{"name":"Test User","email":"test@nmaacademy.ro","password":"TestPass1"}'; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/auth/register" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -Headers @{"Accept"="application/json"} } catch { $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\) | ForEach-Object { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } })

PowerShell($body = '{"name":"Test User","email":"test@nmaacademy.ro","password":"TestPass1"}'; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/auth/register" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -Headers @{"Accept"="application/json"} } catch [System.Net.WebException] { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) })

PowerShell($headers = @{"Accept"="application/json";"Content-Type"="application/json"}; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body '{"email":"p3test@nmaacademy.ro","password":"TestPass1"}' -Headers $headers; Write-Host $r.message; Write-Host "Name:" $r.data.user.name; Write-Host "Status:" $r.data.user.status; Write-Host "Role:" $r.data.user.role; $env:TEST_TOKEN = $r.data.token; Write-Host "Token length:" $r.data.token.Length)

PowerShell($h = @{"Accept"="application/json";"Content-Type"="application/json"}; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body '{"email":"p3test@nmaacademy.ro","password":"TestPass1"}' -Headers $h -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host $r.message; Write-Host "Name:" $r.data.user.name; Write-Host "Status:" $r.data.user.status; $env:T = $r.data.token; Write-Host "Token length:" $env:T.Length)
